milestone_1.name: shell_sidepanel_control
targets: custom shell toolbar with collapse behavior

completion_steps: verify toolbar collapse to left-width and two-button minimum
verify jsondisplayer loads and displays json content
verify same-sidepage guard blocks duplicate assignment
possible_planning_errors: toolbar collapse logic may need refinement for edge state combinations
vertical text rendering may vary across platforms and Tk versions
persistence could cause stale layout state if sidebar content changes between versions
next_milestone_guidance: toolbar docking and mirrored layout options
responsive layout polish for multiple resolutions
